languages.text: Eogunn is one of a kind. Long years of tech-service have let him become a {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}Manipulus{/g} who can accumulate a special resource — Potential Energy — for each AP spent. His mechadendrites channel this energy, empowering allies and punishing enemies by powering Eogunn's special abilities and unique weapon Eogunn is a specialist who combines the Officer abilities with his unique mechanics. Many of Eogunn’s abilities scale with his key attributes — {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g}— as well as the {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerLogicSkill}Logic{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerTechUseSkill}Tech-Use{/g} skills that are directly integrated into his kit.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn is one of a kind. Long years of tech-service have let him become a {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}Manipulus{/g} who can accumulate a special resource — Potential Energy — for each AP spent. His mechadendrites channel this energy, empowering allies and punishing enemies by powering Eogunn's special abilities and unique weapon Eogunn is a specialist who combines the Officer abilities with his unique mechanics. Many of Eogunn’s abilities scale with his key attributes — {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g}— as well as the {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerLogicSkill}Logic{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerTechUseSkill}Tech-Use{/g} skills that are directly integrated into his kit.

languages.text: Eogunn has a unique background. As a {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}Manipulus{/g}, he can accumulate a special resource known as {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} for each AP spent. His mechadendrites channel this energy, empowering allies and punishing enemies through Eogunn's special abilities and unique weapons. Eogunn combines Officer abilities with his own unique features and powers. Many of his abilities scale on his key characteristics — {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} — as well as the {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLogic}Logic{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Tech-Use{/g} skills that are increased due to his background.
languages.original_text: Eogunn is one of a kind. Long years of tech-service have let him become a {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}Manipulus{/g} who can accumulate a special resource — Potential Energy — for each AP spent. His mechadendrites channel this energy, empowering allies and punishing enemies by powering Eogunn's special abilities and unique weapon Eogunn is a specialist who combines the Officer abilities with his unique mechanics. Many of Eogunn’s abilities scale with his key attributes — {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g}— as well as the {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerLogicSkill}Logic{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerTechUseSkill}Tech-Use{/g} skills that are directly integrated into his kit.

traits.locale_text:
Eogunn has a unique background. As a {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}Manipulus{/g}, he can accumulate a special resource known as {g|f:eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}potential energy{/g}, which is used to power various abilities, including {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Galvanic Field{/g}, his primary ability.
His mechadendrites channel this energy, empowering allies and punishing enemies. As a master of mechadendrites, Eogunn can also wield specialised weapons such as the {g|f:09c4605a50c74262aec197ec9f9a9d58}transonic cannon{/g}.

Eogunn has a unique background. As a {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}Manipulus{/g}, he can accumulate a special resource known as {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} for each AP spent. His mechadendrites channel this energy, empowering allies and punishing enemies through Eogunn's special abilities and unique weapons. Eogunn combines Officer abilities with his own unique features and powers. Many of his abilities scale on his key characteristics — {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} — as well as the {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLogic}Logic{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Tech-Use{/g} skills that are increased due to his background.

Eogunn has a unique background. As a {g|f}Manipulus{/g}, he can accumulate a special resource known as {g|f}potential energy{/g} for each AP spent. His mechadendrites channel this energy, empowering allies and punishing enemies through Eogunn's special abilities and unique weapons. Eogunn combines Officer abilities with his own unique features and powers. Many of his abilities scale on his key characteristics — {g|Encyclopedia}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia}Fellowship{/g} — as well as the {g|Encyclopedia}Logic{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia}Tech-Use{/g} skills that are increased due to his background.

Eogunn has a unique background. As a {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}Manipulus{/g}, he can accumulate a special resource known as {g|f:eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}potential energy{/g} for each AP spent. His mechadendrites channel this energy, empowering allies and punishing enemies through Eogunn's special abilities and unique weapons. Eogunn combines Officer abilities with his own unique features and powers. Many of his abilities scale on his key characteristics — {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} — as well as the {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLogic}Logic{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Tech-Use{/g} skills that are increased due to his background.

languages.text: Эоганн — {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}манипулус{/g}. Это уникальное происхождение позволяет ему накапливать особый ресурс — {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальную энергию{/g} — за каждое потраченное очко действия. Мехадендриты направляют эту энергию, усиливая союзников и карая врагов с помощью особых способностей Эоганна и уникальных для него видов оружия. Эоганн сочетает способности офицера со своими собственными особенностями и уникальными возможностями. При расчете эффектов многих его способностей используются ключевые характеристики Эоганна — {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Интеллект{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Общительность{/g}, а также навыки, {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLogic}Логика{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Техника{/g}, увеличенные благодаря его происхождению.
languages.original_text: Eogunn has a unique background. As a {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}Manipulus{/g}, he can accumulate a special resource known as {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} for each AP spent. His mechadendrites channel this energy, empowering allies and punishing enemies through Eogunn's special abilities and unique weapons. Eogunn combines Officer abilities with his own unique features and powers. Many of his abilities scale on his key characteristics — {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} — as well as the {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLogic}Logic{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Tech-Use{/g} skills that are increased due to his background.

traits.locale_text: Эоганн — {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}манипулус{/g}. Это уникальное происхождение позволяет ему накапливать особый ресурс — {g|f:eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}потенциальную энергию{/g} — за каждое потраченное очко действия. Мехадендриты направляют эту энергию, усиливая союзников и карая врагов с помощью особых способностей Эоганна и уникальных для него видов оружия. Эоганн сочетает способности офицера со своими собственными особенностями и уникальными возможностями. При расчете эффектов многих его способностей используются ключевые характеристики Эоганна — {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Интеллект{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Общительность{/g}, а также навыки, {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLogic}Логика{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Техника{/g}, увеличенные благодаря его происхождению.

Эоганн является {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}манипулусом{/g}. Это уникальное происхождение позволяет ему накапливать особый ресурс — {g|f:eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}потенциальную энергию{/g}, которая усиливает его способности, в том числе основную — {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Гальваническое поле{/g}.
Мехадендриты направляют эту энергию, усиливая союзников и карая врагов. Поистине виртуозно владея мехадендритами, Эоганн способен применять специализированное оружие, такое как {g|f:09c4605a50c74262aec197ec9f9a9d58}трансзвуковая пушка{/g}.

Эоганн — {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}манипулус{/g}. Это уникальное происхождение позволяет ему накапливать особый ресурс — {g|f:eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}потенциальную энергию{/g} — за каждое потраченное очко действия. Мехадендриты направляют эту энергию, усиливая союзников и карая врагов с помощью особых способностей Эоганна и уникальных для него видов оружия. Эоганн сочетает способности офицера со своими собственными особенностями и уникальными возможностями. При расчете эффектов многих его способностей используются ключевые характеристики Эоганна — {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Интеллект{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Общительность{/g}, а также навыки, {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLogic}Логика{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Техника{/g}, увеличенные благодаря его происхождению.

languages.text: 伊奥贡拥有独特的背景。作为一名{g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}操纵者{/g}，每消耗1点行动点数，他就能积累一种名为{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}的特殊资源。 他的机械触须会引导这种能量，通过其特殊能力和专属武器来强化盟友、惩戒敌人。 伊奥贡将军官能力与自身独有的特性和力量结合在一起。他的许多能力会受到关键属性的影响，包括{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}智力{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}F社交{/g}，以及因其背景而获得提升的{g|Encyclopedia:SkillLogic}逻辑{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}科技使用{/g}。
languages.original_text: Eogunn has a unique background. As a {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}Manipulus{/g}, he can accumulate a special resource known as {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} for each AP spent. His mechadendrites channel this energy, empowering allies and punishing enemies through Eogunn's special abilities and unique weapons. Eogunn combines Officer abilities with his own unique features and powers. Many of his abilities scale on his key characteristics — {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} — as well as the {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLogic}Logic{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Tech-Use{/g} skills that are increased due to his background.

traits.locale_text: 伊奥贡拥有独特的背景。作为一名{g|f}操纵者{/g}，每消耗1点行动点数，他就能积累一种名为{g|f}势能{/g}的特殊资源。 他的机械触须会引导这种能量，通过其特殊能力和专属武器来强化盟友、惩戒敌人。 伊奥贡将军官能力与自身独有的特性和力量结合在一起。他的许多能力会受到关键属性的影响，包括{g|Encyclopedia}智力{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia}社交{/g}，以及因其背景而获得提升的{g|Encyclopedia}逻辑{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia}科技使用{/g}。

languages.text: Eogunn a des origines uniques. En tant que {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}manipulus{/g}, il peut accumuler une ressource spéciale, l'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}, pour chaque PA dépensé. Ses mécadendrites canalisent cette énergie pour renforcer ses alliés et punir ses ennemis grâce à ses capacités spéciales et à ses armes exclusives. Eogunn dispose de capacités d'officier et de ses propres attributs et pouvoirs. La plupart de ses capacités dépendent de ses caractéristiques clés : l'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} et la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Sociabilité{/g}, ainsi que de ses compétences {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLogic}Logique{/g} et {g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Technomaîtrise{/g}, elles-mêmes renforcées par son histoire personnelle.
languages.original_text: Eogunn has a unique background. As a {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}Manipulus{/g}, he can accumulate a special resource known as {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} for each AP spent. His mechadendrites channel this energy, empowering allies and punishing enemies through Eogunn's special abilities and unique weapons. Eogunn combines Officer abilities with his own unique features and powers. Many of his abilities scale on his key characteristics — {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} — as well as the {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLogic}Logic{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Tech-Use{/g} skills that are increased due to his background.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn a des origines uniques. En tant que {g|f}manipulus{/g}, il peut accumuler une ressource spéciale, l'{g|f}Énergie potentielle{/g}, pour chaque PA dépensé. Ses mécadendrites canalisent cette énergie pour renforcer ses alliés et punir ses ennemis grâce à ses capacités spéciales et à ses armes exclusives. Eogunn dispose de capacités d'officier et de ses propres attributs et pouvoirs. La plupart de ses capacités dépendent de ses caractéristiques clés : l'{g|Encyclopedia}Intelligence{/g} et la {g|Encyclopedia}Sociabilité{/g}, ainsi que de ses compétences {g|Encyclopedia}Logique{/g} et {g|Encyclopedia}Technomaîtrise{/g}, elles-mêmes renforcées par son histoire personnelle.

languages.text: Eogunn tiene un trasfondo único. Como {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}manipulus{/g}, puede acumular un recurso especial conocido como {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g} por cada PA que usa. Sus mecadendritas canalizan esta energía para reforzar a los aliados y castigar a los enemigos mediante las capacidades especiales de Eogunn y sus armas únicas. Eogunn combina capacidades de oficial con sus propios rasgos y poderes. Muchas de sus capacidades dependen de sus características clave, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Inteligencia{/g} y {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Empatía{/g}, además de las habilidades {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLogic}Lógica{/g} y {g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Uso de tecnología{/g}, que son más elevadas por su trasfondo.
languages.original_text: Eogunn has a unique background. As a {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}Manipulus{/g}, he can accumulate a special resource known as {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} for each AP spent. His mechadendrites channel this energy, empowering allies and punishing enemies through Eogunn's special abilities and unique weapons. Eogunn combines Officer abilities with his own unique features and powers. Many of his abilities scale on his key characteristics — {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} — as well as the {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLogic}Logic{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Tech-Use{/g} skills that are increased due to his background.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn tiene un trasfondo único. Como {g|f}manipulus{/g}, puede acumular un recurso especial conocido como {g|f}energía potencial{/g} por cada PA que usa. Sus mecadendritas canalizan esta energía para reforzar a los aliados y castigar a los enemigos mediante las capacidades especiales de Eogunn y sus armas únicas. Eogunn combina capacidades de oficial con sus propios rasgos y poderes. Muchas de sus capacidades dependen de sus características clave, {g|Encyclopedia}Inteligencia{/g} y {g|Encyclopedia}Empatía{/g}, además de las habilidades {g|Encyclopedia}Lógica{/g} y {g|Encyclopedia}Uso de tecnología{/g}, que son más elevadas por su trasfondo.

languages.text: Eogunn hat eine einzigartige Geschichte. Als {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}Manipulus{/g} kann er für jeden investierten AP eine besondere Ressource namens {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g} aufbauen. Seine Mechadendriten kanalisieren diese Energie, um Verbündete zu stärken und Gegner mit Eogunns Spezialfähigkeiten und einzigartigen Waffen zu bestrafen. Eogunn kombiniert Offizier-Fähigkeiten mit seinen eigenen Fähigkeiten und Kräften. Viele seiner Fähigkeiten basieren auf seinen wichtigsten Eigenschaften — {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligenz{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Gefolgschaft{/g} — ebenso wie seine Fähigkeiten {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLogic}Logik{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Tech-Einsatz{/g}, die aufgrund seiner Geschichte erhöht werden.
languages.original_text: Eogunn has a unique background. As a {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}Manipulus{/g}, he can accumulate a special resource known as {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} for each AP spent. His mechadendrites channel this energy, empowering allies and punishing enemies through Eogunn's special abilities and unique weapons. Eogunn combines Officer abilities with his own unique features and powers. Many of his abilities scale on his key characteristics — {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} — as well as the {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLogic}Logic{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Tech-Use{/g} skills that are increased due to his background.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn hat eine einzigartige Geschichte. Als {g|f}Manipulus{/g} kann er für jeden investierten AP eine besondere Ressource namens {g|f}Potenzialenergie{/g} aufbauen. Seine Mechadendriten kanalisieren diese Energie, um Verbündete zu stärken und Gegner mit Eogunns Spezialfähigkeiten und einzigartigen Waffen zu bestrafen. Eogunn kombiniert Offizier-Fähigkeiten mit seinen eigenen Fähigkeiten und Kräften. Viele seiner Fähigkeiten basieren auf seinen wichtigsten Eigenschaften — {g|Encyclopedia}Intelligenz{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia}Gefolgschaft{/g} — ebenso wie seine Fähigkeiten {g|Encyclopedia}Logik{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia}Tech-Einsatz{/g}, die aufgrund seiner Geschichte erhöht werden.

languages.text: Eogunn, benzersiz bir geçmişe sahiptir. Bir {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}Manipülus{/g} olarak, harcadığı her EP için {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} adı verilen özel bir kaynağı toplayabilir. Mekadentritleri, bu enerjiyi aktararak Eogunn'un özel kabiliyetleri ve eşsiz silahları aracılığıyla dost birimleri güçlendirirken düşmanları ise cezalandırır. Eogunn, Subay kabiliyetlerini kendi eşsiz özellik ve güçleriyle birleştirir. Kabiliyetlerinin çoğu, geçmişinden dolayı gelişmiş {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Zekâ{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Sosyallik{/g} gibi ana niteliklerinin yanı sıra{g|Encyclopedia:SkillLogic}Mantık{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Tekno Aşinalığı{/g} yetenekleriyle de ölçeklenir.
languages.original_text: Eogunn has a unique background. As a {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}Manipulus{/g}, he can accumulate a special resource known as {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} for each AP spent. Eogunn combines Officer abilities with his own unique features and powers. Bir {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}Manipülus{/g} olarak, harcadığı her EP için {g|f:eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}potansiyel enerji{/g} adı verilen özel bir kaynağı toplayabilir. Mekadentritleri, bu enerjiyi aktararak Eogunn'un özel kabiliyetleri ve eşsiz silahları aracılığıyla dost birimleri güçlendirirken düşmanları ise cezalandırır. Eogunn, Subay kabiliyetlerini kendi eşsiz özellik ve güçleriyle birleştirir. Kabiliyetlerinin çoğu, geçmişinden dolayı gelişmiş {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Zekâ{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Sosyallik{/g} gibi ana niteliklerinin yanı sıra {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerLogicSkill}Mantık{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerTechUseSkill}Tekno Aşinalığı{/g} yetenekleriyle de ölçeklenir.

languages.text:
エオグンは独特の背景を持つ。{g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}マニピュラス{/g}として、彼はAPを1消費するごとに、{g|f:eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}潜在エネルギー{/g}と呼ばれる特別な資源を蓄積することができる。
彼の機械枝は、このエネルギーを伝導し、エオグンの特別な能力と独自の武器によって味方を強化し敵を罰する。
エオグンは、{g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}オフィサー{/g}の能力と独自の特性と能力を組み合わせる。彼の多くの能力は、彼の重要な特徴である{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}知性{/g}と{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}仲間意識{/g}、そして彼の背景によって強化された{g|Encyclopedia:SkillLogic}論理{/g}と{g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}技術使用{/g}スキルに依存する。
languages.original_text: Eogunn has a unique background. As a {g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}Manipulus{/g}, he can accumulate a special resource known as {g|f:eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}potential energy{/g} for each AP spent. His mechadendrites channel this energy, empowering allies and punishing enemies through Eogunn's special abilities and unique weapons. Eogunn combines Officer abilities with his own unique features and powers. Many of his abilities scale on his key characteristics — {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} — as well as the {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLogic}Logic{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Tech-Use{/g} skills that are increased due to his background.

彼の機械枝は、このエネルギーを伝導し、エオグンの特別な能力と独自の武器によって味方を強化し敵を罰する。
エオグンは、{g|f:b901e045ca514d53bae43f4a9ecdf0b4}オフィサー{/g}の能力と独自の特性と能力を組み合わせる。彼の多くの能力は、彼の重要な特徴である{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}知性{/g}と{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}仲間意識{/g}、そして彼の背景によって強化された{g|Encyclopedia:SkillLogic}論理{/g}と{g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}技術使用{/g}スキルに依存する。
